title: Scotch Egg with British Flair
description: A classic scotch egg taken to the next level with a British twist. Crispy, savory, and utterly delicious!
instructions: In a bowl, mix together the ground scotch, nutty seasonings, and a pinch of salt.
Divide the mixture into 6 equal parts and shape each into a ball.
Flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Wrap each disk around a hard-boiled egg, pressing the edges to seal.
Dredge the scotch eggs in a mixture of flour, paprika, and a pinch of salt.
Fry the scotch eggs in the preheated oil until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain the scotch eggs on paper towels and let cool for a few minutes.
If desired, brush the scotch eggs with lacquer sauce.
Serve the scotch eggs hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
